title: heliotropium hispidulum
intro: Heliotropium hispidulum, also known as the hairy heliotrope or hairy turnsole, is a plant species in the borage family that is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Heliotropium hispidulum include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease coughs, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or added to topical creams and ointments for localized treatment.
